game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Square Bird - Flappy Chicken** Players control a square bird that automatically moves horizontally across a side-scrolling environment, with the primary interaction being a tap anywhere on the screen to make the bird lay a square egg and simultaneously jump upwards. Each tap adds one egg to a stack beneath the bird, increasing its height by 1 unit, which is crucial for clearing obstacles like varying height barriers (e.g., 3-5 units tall) or gaps. The game ends immediately if the bird collides with an obstacle or falls off the screen, with the objective being to achieve the highest possible distance score. Landing perfectly on the ground (i.e., touching the grass) exactly 3 consecutive times without hitting an obstacle activates "Square Bird Fever" mode for 5 seconds, granting temporary invulnerability and an increased score multiplier. Progression is centered on achieving higher distances and collecting in-game currency (e.g., "feathers") during runs, which can be spent to unlock new cosmetic bird skins. Difficulty scales by increasing the bird's horizontal speed and introducing more complex, tightly spaced obstacle patterns.
game_info.description: Guide your square bird through an endless side-scrolling world! Tap SPACE to lay eggs and jump upward. Each egg stacks beneath you, helping you clear tall barriers and gaps. Land perfectly on the ground 3 times in a row to activate Square Bird Fever - temporary invulnerability with bonus points! Collect feathers for currency. Survive as long as possible and rack up the highest distance score!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Lay an egg and jump upward
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen (available after game over)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and egg-laying test. Validates that the bird can jump, lay eggs, and maintain stable flight without crashing immediately. Tests basic survival mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Periodically press SPACE to maintain altitude and avoid falling off screen. Jump at regular intervals to keep the bird airborne while building a moderate egg stack.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Bird should survive for at least 10 seconds, lay multiple eggs, and maintain a stable flight pattern. Test succeeds if no immediate crashes occur and basic mechanics function correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal winning strategy test. Implements intelligent obstacle avoidance and perfect landing mechanics to achieve Square Bird Fever mode and maximum score.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyzes upcoming obstacles and calculates optimal jump timing. Builds egg stacks strategically to clear barriers. Attempts to land perfectly on ground 3 consecutive times to trigger fever mode. Maintains survival while maximizing distance.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Bird should survive extended gameplay (60+ seconds), successfully clear multiple obstacles, achieve Square Bird Fever mode at least once, collect feathers, and reach a high distance score demonstrating mastery of game mechanics.
